title: <div><tt>|---------------------|------------------------------------------------
content:
|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| ::MAP_OS_4BLOOM | Master cascade architecture. All artist IDs, projects, logic modes, relationships. |
| ::SYMB0LS_GLYPH_NET | System for assigning and tracking symbolic glyphs across domains and formats. |
| ::Qv33R_CORE | Archive of nonfiction systems: queer pedagogy, podcast arcs, essay outlines, catharsis maps. |
| ::GR1ND3R_LOGIK | Surreal logic engine for horror narrative systems, ARG engines, rot/memory studies. |
| ::MET4_CORE | Myth engine evolution: text → system → ritual → VR, includes theology, cosmology. |
| ::ETC_AUDIO_NET | Music architecture, ETCETER4 systems, sampling rulesets, LoCreance, label workflows. |
| ::KONS0L_ARCHIV | Research engine: bibliography, myth archive, syllabus modules, study objects. |
| ::BIZ_MODE_X | Business layer: monetization schemes, pitch decks, e-product pipelines. |
